text: Most portfolios hand you a list.
Here is where I went to school.
Here is where I worked.
Here are some skills I claim to have.
This one is different.
My name is Estivan Ayramia.
I am Chaldean.
Born in Baghdad, raised in El Cajon,
built from the ground up.
My family crossed borders most people only read about.
That kind of background does not make you fragile.
It makes you resourceful.
This site is not a resume.
It is a system,
structure,
proof,
real work you can check,
not a pitch you have to trust.
Every project here was built to be examined,
not admired from a distance,
but pulled apart up close.
There is a carousel that lets you explore
at your own pace.
A roulette that decides for you.
Fourteen arcade games because work should not be
the only thing that is well crafted.
Even the AI on this site has a name.
She is called Savonie,
and she will answer almost anything about me.
Try her.
I care about people,
process, and doing the work right.
You are about to see all of it.
Welcome in.
